name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.BodyBalanceHelper.MoveRadius
summary: If -ve don't move away from pusher unless moveWhenBracing is true and braceDistance  GT  0.0f.  if the pusher is closer than moveRadius then move away from it.
remarks:
Default value = -1.0f.
            Min value = -1.0f.
            Max value = 2.0f.
